description: A side-by-side pair of color photographs. At left, a heavyset man with a gray goatee in a cap and dark jacket, handcuffed, is held by an officer indoors. At right, a man in sunglasses and a blue-and-white ICE vest labeled 'TODD LYONS ACTING DIRECTOR' speaks at a lectern bearing the Department of Homeland Security seal. A caption bar across the bottom carries a quoted threat in capital letters.
notable_text: TODD LYONS ACTING DIRECTOR; ICE; U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY; BULLETS TO THE BACK OF THEIR MAGGOT NAZI HEADS!
